task: Final consultation before writing the architecture truth map and narrative. Proposed final top three for Kubernetes: CRI, CRDs/API extensibility, and CSI. Server-Side Apply is demoted to important but not top-three. Request related architectural motifs, historical lineage, prior decision traces, contradiction candidates, and recurring themes. Audit overclaim risk, false paths, and whether consultation actually changed the search trajectory.

context.summary: Consult phase recovered CSI as a baseline-missed decision under a recurring out-of-tree integration motif. Need final contradiction pressure and claim boundary before publishing required artifacts.
